name: The Sundered Crowns
description: A continent where a dozen kingdoms have warred so long that borders have dissolved into a patchwork of contested ground. Forests, mountains, and open plains are the arenas, and every crossing risks running into someone else's army. Above the squabbling thrones, dragons hunt the chaos as apex predators.
mood: Grounded medieval grit shot through with bright, dangerous magic. Every field is a battlefield, and the sky belongs to dragons.
biome: war-torn plains, forests, and mountains carved up between a dozen kingdoms

enemies.name: Footsoldier
enemies.role: basic melee that attacks in numbers
enemies.description: A helmeted levy in a padded gambeson with a short sword.

enemies.name: Pikeman
enemies.role: reach melee that strikes from the second rank
enemies.description: A soldier in mail shouldering a long iron-tipped pike.

enemies.name: Crossbowman
enemies.role: ranged attacker, slow to reload between shots
enemies.description: A leather-clad trooper cranking a heavy crossbow.

enemies.name: Shieldman
enemies.role: tanky front-liner that blocks and soaks hits
enemies.description: A footman crouched behind a tall painted kite shield.

enemyBatches.name: STANDARD
enemyBatches.description: cost 2-3, the backbone of any kingdom's army

enemies.name: Knight
enemies.role: armored melee bruiser with high HP
enemies.description: A full-plate warrior with a visored helm and longsword.

enemies.name: Battle Wizard
enemies.description: A robed mage with hands crackling with battlefield magic.

enemies.name: War Cleric
enemies.description: An armored priest with a holy symbol and heavy mace.

enemies.name: Horseman
enemies.role: fast cavalry that charges to close distance
enemies.description: A lance-wielding rider on a barded warhorse.

enemyBatches.name: ELITE
enemyBatches.description: cost 4-5, rare officers and leashed war-beasts

enemies.name: Banner Captain
enemies.role: aura that buffs attack of nearby allied troops
enemies.description: A plumed officer holding his kingdom's war banner high.

enemies.name: Champion
enemies.role: elite duelist with heavy single-target damage
enemies.description: A scarred knight in gilded armor with a bastard sword.

enemies.name: Court Wizard
enemies.role: high-damage mage with large area nukes
enemies.description: A richly robed sorcerer wreathed in fire and light.

enemies.name: Young Dragon
enemies.role: flying beast with a short-range fire breath
enemies.description: A cart-sized dragon chained at the neck, straining against its handlers.

enemyBatches.name: BOSS
enemyBatches.description: cost high, one apex dragon per field

enemies.name: Red Dragon
enemies.role: apex boss with a wide fire-breath cone
enemies.description: A mountain-sized red dragon wreathed in smoke and flame.

enemies.name: Frost Dragon
enemies.role: boss whose ice breath slows and freezes targets
enemies.description: A pale dragon rimed in frost, its breath fogging the cold air.

enemies.name: Green Dragon
enemies.role: boss whose poison breath deals damage over time
enemies.description: A moss-scaled dragon dripping caustic green venom.

enemies.name: Black Dragon
enemies.role: largest, tankiest boss with a knockback wing buffet
enemies.description: A vast black-scaled dragon whose shadow darkens the whole field.

items.name: Longsword
items.description: A long double-edged blade for one or two hands.

items.name: Sabre
items.description: A curved cavalry sword built for fast slashing.

items.name: Bastard Sword
items.description: A heavy hand-and-a-half sword with brutal reach.

items.name: Pike
items.description: A very long polearm for holding a line.

items.name: Lance
items.description: A couched cavalry lance for charging strikes.

items.name: Halberd
items.description: A polearm with an axe head and a reaching spike.

items.name: Longbow
items.description: A tall wooden bow with steady range.

items.name: Crossbow
items.description: A cranked bow that punches through armor.

items.name: Heavy Crossbow
items.description: A windlass crossbow firing armor-piercing bolts.

items.name: Oak Staff
items.description: A simple wooden staff for channeling magic.

items.name: War Staff
items.description: An iron-shod staff that hurls battle magic.

items.name: Crozier
items.description: A cleric's crooked staff that heals allies and smites foes.

items.name: War Hammer
items.description: A two-handed hammer that dents plate armor.

items.name: Greatsword
items.description: A massive two-handed blade with sweeping arcs.

items.name: Poleaxe
items.description: A two-handed axe-hammer that splits knights open.
